platform.display_label: WFA | BTCUSDT | Monthly Nth Weekday Same Session | Binance | Example

notes: References the BTCUSDT monthly nth-weekday same-session parameter matrix example in workspace/runs.
The parameter grid is month_week 1-4 times weekday Monday-Sunday.
Daily crypto candles approximate same-session open/close under exchange UTC candle conventions and are not executable fill guarantees.
This example is for WFA mechanics and local research only; it is not a calendar-anomaly claim, live-trading signal, broker instruction, or investment advice.
